title: Coruscant wedding hairbow
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Coruscant wedding hairbow''' was a white ribbon tied in a complex way. On [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], it was traditionally worn in the [[Hair/Legends|hair]] of a bride on her [[Marriage/Legends|wedding]].<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>

[[Shada D'ukal]] knew how to create a type of wedding bow that could be created in just a few minutes. She created and used such a bow in order to infiltrate the building where [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her family lived.<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}
